result.stdout:
SQLComp.CLI 1.0.14+14ab67b2e7ba557392d6ea7931fd47003d1a68c9
Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen

  t, target      Required. (Default: ) Target comparison file

  o, output      (Default: patch.sql) Output patching file

  f, force       (Default: false) Force remove existing patch file

  c, check       (Default: false) Select only the top 10 rows (this is just for
                 testing you made the correct syntax)

  p, patchreg    (Default: false) Set of patch regex replacements to execute
                 (MATCH;;;REPLACE)

  r, retry       (Default: 0) How many times the system should retry to get data
                 if something fails

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.
